arts.ttl: Player ‘has a preference’ to join Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal – Has chosen his PL destinations
arts.sum: Sporting star Viktor Gyökeres is eyeing a move to Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s A Bola, who state the striker favours a move to the Premier League. It’s further claimed the 26-year-old ‘has a preference’ of joining Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal.
